description_long: This induction cooker features a robust, industrial-grade stainless steel body with a prominent front-facing oven door and four large control knobs aligned horizontally above it. The cooktop is surrounded by raised metal edges, likely to prevent spills, and the surface appears flat and easy to clean. The left side of the front panel includes two additional round controls and indicator lights, suggesting multiple heating zones or functions. The sides and back are plain, with a brushed metal finish and no visible openings or controls, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The cooker stands on four sturdy legs, elevating it above the ground for ventilation and ease of cleaning. A small label or plaque is visible on the lower right of the front panel, possibly indicating the brand or model.
description: A heavy-duty stainless steel induction cooker with four control knobs, a front oven door, and a flat cooktop surrounded by raised edges. The design is industrial and functional, with a brushed metal finish and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows four control knobs, oven door, two additional controls on the left, and a small label on the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain brushed metal surface with no controls or openings, and the raised cooktop edges.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, featureless metal panel with a uniform finish and no visible components.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain metal surface and the side profile of the control knobs.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper front face, featuring four large round knobs evenly spaced in a horizontal row, with two smaller round controls and indicator lights vertically aligned on the left side. A small label or plaque is present on the lower right.
